creator: freebsd-ports@dan.me.uk
text:
Created attachment 184716
Update cacti to 1.1.15

Update cacti to 1.1.15 to fix bugs.
No CVEs covered in this update.

Please ignore the portlint warnings about gettext... cacti handles gettext support internally so gettext is not required in Makefile.

Poudriere testport logs for 10.3/11.0 i386/amd64 are located at:

https://poudriere.dan.tm/poudriere/data/latest-per-pkg/cacti/1.1.15/
